pvp-enabled: PVP enabled! You can now attack and be attacked by other PVP players.
pvp-disabled: PVP disabled. You are now safe from PVP combat.
pvp-cooldown: You must wait {0} more second(s) before toggling PVP again.
pvp-cannot-attack: You cannot attack {0} - they do not have PVP enabled.
pvp-cannot-be-attacked: {0} cannot attack you - you do not have PVP enabled.
